data.name: Mister Versatile: A Gay Superhero Visual Novel
data.detailed_description:
New DLCS Driller's Turn, Brotherhunks, and Versivion are AVAILABLE NOW!


A gay superhero visual novel! The Lone Wolf Mister Versatile thinks super teams are a pain in the ass, but four super-hotties have decided they want to watch his back anyway! Date a villain, a rookie, a symbiote, and a superman-ish alien. Loaded with explicit CGs.



Mister Versatile is screwed, and not in the good way. Baddies have penetrated his tender headquarters. Will Mr. V finally let down his guard and get the help he needs?

If so, which superhero will teach him how to play nice with others? By Studio Kosen, the artists who created the To Trust an Incubus demo!

Mister Versatile is an Adults Only Gay Visual Novel Featuring:

  • Animated Sequences
  • 4 Routes
  • Partial Voice Acting
  • Press 'v' on your keyboard to have all text read aloud
  • 12 Endings
  • Hundreds of CGs
  • An OST with 31 Funky Songs
  • 30 Steam Achievements
  • Text in both English and Spanish

Chose the amount of hair you play Mister Versatile With!



Partial Voice Acting by Sean Chiplock (The Legend of Zelda: Breath of the Wild, Final Fantasy 7 Remake, Persona 5, Detective Pikachu)


Introducing Tim Castaway as the voice of Captain Crush


Partial Voice Acting by Cole Feuchter (To Trust an Incubus, Ishida And Asakura, Camp Buddy, Full Service, The Divine Speaker)


Partial Voice Acting by Jasper Harrow (Morningdew Farms)


Partial Voice Acting by Scott Winter (Alpha Hole Prison)


Partial Voice Acting by Gary Scales (Tom Clancy's Division 2, Dying Light 2, My Time at Portia)


Partial Voice Acting by Kiba Walker (To Trust an Incubus, Black Clover, Camp Buddy, Full Service, Saint Seiya)

Other Voice Actors:
​Bad Guy #1 - Steven Aries
​Bad Guy #2 - Derek Bissell
Person in Distress - Michaela Laws

data.short_description: A gay superhero visual novel! The Lone Wolf Mister Versatile thinks super teams are a pain in the ass, but four super-hotties have decided they want to watch his back anyway! Date a villain, a rookie, a symbiote, and a superman-ish alien. Loaded with explicit CGs.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙
*具備完整音效支援的語言
data.reviews:
“Surprisingly well executed...I appreciate the design here, a lot. There's a lot of mechanics here and the manipulation never feels like it's about tricking someone into sex...Really well done. Fantastic story. Great game design. This is really high up on my list of favorite games. It's probably in the top 25...way better than I thought it was going to be.”
Gayme Boys Podcast on Spotify, Episode 31 - Be Gay, Do War Crimes

“...the artwork is absolutely gorgeous and really captures the super hero aesthetic with a yaoi touch wonderfully, though with the super hero genre already being made up of tight bodies and even tighter costumes the mix of heroes and yaoi is a match made in heaven. I myself being a fujoshi of particular tastes especially enjoyed the character of Lascivion which brought to life many fantasy I have had in the past about a particular Marvel symbiote and the naughty moments with this character were some of my favourite in the game as was the surprise mini game in his route.”
Yaoi Playground

“An aspect of the game which turned out to be a particular treat is the references to superhero and queer culture which is prevalent through the demo. It almost makes Mister Versatile feel like an ode to the gay geek sub-culture of the community at times.”
Magnus Alexander, Magnus Plays

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card, Latest Intel GC Drivers
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64+
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
